title: Bulk Email in Work Management
excerpt: As seen below, I’m not the only one with this issue - and worse, it’s not needed in my case for customers, but for internal work management, which is the point of this system. Having talked with your customer service, th…

posts.author: dharrell-a1 (David Harrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
As seen below, I’m not the only one with this issue - and worse, it’s not needed in my case for customers, but for internal work management, which is the point of this system. Having talked with your customer service, they agree that this is an excellent idea - so let’s get it done! Otherwise, what’s the point of work management being separate?

Mass email from Work Management board - Platform discussions / monday CRM - monday Community Forum

posts.author: arkitrave (Eric Shepherd)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created that other ticket when I had first subscribed to CRM.

I would expect that bulk email would only exist for CRM customers, and from boards that are within the CRM system. However, I think bulk email should be possible from any boards other than Contacts, as long as one is a CRM customer.

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @dharrell-a1,

It’s painful to not have bulk email in the work management.
You can use EasyMails app to design and send bulk emails.
